purpose: Measure remaining sequence-decision headroom and localize STP failure modes; oracle variants are diagnostic and not deployable methods.

oracles.method_selection: For each frame, select a correct prediction from TPA, STP mean, or STP LOO when one exists; otherwise retain STP mean.
oracles.sequence_candidate: Select the true class only when it appears among TPA top-1 candidates in the real sequence; otherwise retain STP mean.
oracles.event_constant: For non-singleton real sequences, broadcast the modal ground-truth class; singleton frames retain STP mean. This is an upper diagnostic bound, not a method.

claim_boundary: Development-only error decomposition. No oracle result is a deployable performance claim and no held-out result may be inferred.
